ROM: Upper Extremity Motion Code CHAR 1 The data in this column identifies the resident's level of upper extremity limitation (shoulder, elbow, wrist, hand). -=Not assessed/no information
0=No impairment
1=Impairment on one side
2=Impairment on both sides discontinued 09/30/2023
246 G0400B_LWR_XTRMTY_MTN_CD G0400B_LWR_XTRMTY_MTN_CD G0400B Functional Limitation in ROM: Lower Extremity Motion Code CHAR 1 The data in this column identifies the resident's level of lower extremity limitation
